title: opt_pushselect stuck with multi-table UDF
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (user_id INT PRIMARY KEY, username VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, bio TEXT NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO users (user_id, username, bio) VALUES (1, 'alice', 'Loves programming and databases.');
INSERT INTO users (user_id, username, bio) VALUES (2, 'bob', 'Enjoys hiking and outdoor activities.');
SELECT user_id, bio FROM users WHERE CHAR_LENGTH(bio) > 10;
